name: MACHICURA
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 12-27 MW per block (Maule chain downstream of Colbun).  Convert to FlowRight on the Machicura gen waterway with flow_min = pmin / rendi (rendi ≈ 0.327).  Without the rewrite, the LP forces gen ≥ pmin and consumes Colbun water that the upstream balance can't supply at p27/p28 winter inflows — root cause of the iter-0 cascade on juan/gtopt_iplp.  When gtopt_expand maule_machicura is also active, that template already places FlowRights at the MACHICURA junction; this entry is the standalone fallback for cases that don't enable the Maule agreement.

name: PANGUE
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 20 MW per block.  Pangue is downstream of Ralco; its pmin reflects environmental + irrigation flow obligations on the Bio-Bio chain.  Convert to FlowRight on the Pangue gen waterway with flow_min = pmin / rendi (rendi ≈ 0.8) so spillway can also satisfy the right when the turbine cannot.

name: PILMAIQUEN
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 7 MW per block.  Pilmaiquen has minimum-flow obligations downstream (rio Pilmaiquen).  Convert to FlowRight with flow_min = 7 / rendi.

name: ABANICO
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 5 MW per block.  Abanico minimum flow on Laja branch.  Convert to FlowRight on the Abanico gen waterway.

name: ANTUCO
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 17.14 MW per block.  Antuco minimum flow downstream of El Toro on the Laja chain.  Convert to FlowRight with flow_min = 17.14 / rendi (rendi ≈ 1.6).

name: PALMUCHO
description: plpcnfce.dat pmin = 27.14 MW per block.  Palmucho is the small downstream plant of Ralco (extraction-2 route).  Convert to FlowRight on the Palmucho gen waterway.
